anatomy.description: Pill-shaped container (border-radius: 9999px). Padding: 8px horizontal, 4px vertical. Background and border depend on type.

Leading icon, 16px. Controlled by iconShow (default: true) and iconType (default: null → uses Customer-Icon/alert-war-triangle). Decorative — must be aria-hidden. Color matches the text token for the given type.

iconType.description: Custom icon node. When null, uses Customer-Icon/alert-war-triangle.

anatomy.description: Short text string. Manrope SemiBold, 12px, whitespace-nowrap. Color depends on type.

types.name: error
types.semantics: Error, critical status, failed state, blocked action.

types.name: info
types.semantics: Informational status, pending state, neutral system metadata.

types.name: Success
types.semantics: Completed, confirmed, active, approved, positive state.

types.name: Warning
types.semantics: Cautionary state, attention required, expiring, degraded.
types.backgroundTokenNote: Token name uses a double dash (warning--bg) — this is the confirmed Figma token name.

types.name: default
types.semantics: Neutral label, category, generic metadata. No status meaning.

types.name: outlined
types.semantics: Secondary, de-emphasized, or inactive label. No background fill.

variantNote: No structural variants. Type is the primary dimension (6 color types).
sizeNote: Single size only. No size variants.
stateNote: No interactive states defined in Figma. Badge is a display-only component.

typography.note: All six types share the same text style. Only the color token differs per type.

usageContext: Status, category, or contextual metadata labels on list items, cards, and headers.
Confirmed in Dojo Customer App (node 1361:13772) and Dojo Driver App (node 2007:325).
notes: Six confirmed types: error, info, Success, Warning, default, outlined.
Note: 'Success' and 'Warning' are capitalized in the Figma prop. Other types are lowercase.
The outlined type has a 1px solid border and no background fill.
The --notification/warning--bg token has a double dash — confirmed Figma token name.
The outlined and default types share the same text token (--badge/default/text, #34353f).
No icon support, no size variants, no interactive states defined in Figma.
